description_long: This is a modern laptop with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The keyboard features prominent, raised keys in a striking red color, contrasting sharply with the black chassis. The screen is large and flat, with no visible bezels or branding, and is currently off, displaying a uniform black surface. The touchpad is centrally located below the keyboard, flanked by two distinct buttons. The sides and back of the laptop are smooth, with no visible ports or connectors. The overall appearance is minimalist and bold, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A matte black laptop with bold red keys, a large black screen, and a minimalist, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard with red keys, large black screen, and central touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and the raised red keys, with no visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, featureless black back with no visible details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the angular design and red keyboard.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with no visible function row or numeric keypad; keys are raised and colored red.
